description_long: This is a wooden chaise with a rectangular frame and a prominent, solid headboard that features two open storage cubbies. The frame is constructed from a richly grained wood, with visible slats running lengthwise to support a mattress or cushion. The headboard is tall and boxy, providing both structural support and functional shelving for small items. The legs are short and blocky, integrated seamlessly into the frame for a sturdy appearance. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with clean lines and a warm wood finish. There are no visible armrests or upholstery, and the chaise is designed for use with a separate mattress or cushion.
description: A modern wooden chaise with a tall headboard featuring two open cubbies and a slatted support frame. The design is minimalist, with a warm wood finish and no visible upholstery or armrests.
description_view_0: This view highlights the left side and the solid, rectangular headboard with its open cubbies, as well as the slatted wooden frame.
description_view_1: The front view shows the full headboard with two open storage cubbies and the lengthwise slats of the frame.
description_view_2: This angle displays the right side of the chaise, emphasizing the depth of the headboard and the open cubbies.
description_view_3: The rear view focuses on the back of the headboard and the frame's structure, with the slats partially visible.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a tall, rectangular headboard with a flat top and two open cubby shelves integrated into its face. It is solid, uncurved, and has a minimalist, functional appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, blocky, and integrated into the corners of the frame, made from the same wood as the rest of the structure, with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery or fabric; the entire surface is exposed wood with a natural grain pattern.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the frame is designed to accommodate a separate mattress or cushion, but none are included in the current configuration.
